metadata.curriculum: IB Math Analysis and Approaches (AA) SL

knowledge_components.name: Arithmetic sequences and series
knowledge_components.description: nth term formula (un = u1 + (n-1)d), sum of n terms (Sn = n/2(2u1 + (n-1)d)), recognising and applying arithmetic sequences in context.

knowledge_components.name: Geometric sequences and series
knowledge_components.description: nth term (un = u1 * r^(n-1)), sum of finite geometric series, convergence condition |r| < 1, sum to infinity S∞ = u1/(1-r).

knowledge_components.name: Sigma notation
knowledge_components.description: Reading and writing sums in sigma notation, evaluating finite sums, connecting sigma notation to arithmetic and geometric series formulas.

knowledge_components.name: Laws of exponents
knowledge_components.description: Product, quotient, power rules; zero and negative exponents; rational exponents (fractional powers as roots); simplifying exponential expressions.

knowledge_components.name: Logarithms and logarithmic laws
knowledge_components.description: Definition as inverse of exponential, log laws (product, quotient, power), change of base formula, solving equations using logs.

knowledge_components.name: Binomial theorem
knowledge_components.description: Expanding (a+b)^n using binomial coefficients nCr, Pascal's triangle, finding specific terms in an expansion.

knowledge_components.name: Systems of linear equations
knowledge_components.description: Solving 2×2 and 3×3 systems by substitution and elimination, interpreting solutions geometrically, inconsistent and dependent systems.

knowledge_components.name: Quadratic equations and functions
knowledge_components.description: Factoring, completing the square, quadratic formula, discriminant (nature of roots), vertex form, axis of symmetry.

knowledge_components.name: Domain, range, and function notation
knowledge_components.description: Function notation f(x), mapping diagrams, identifying domain and range from equations and graphs, restricting domains.

knowledge_components.name: Transformations of functions
knowledge_components.description: Vertical/horizontal translations f(x)+a and f(x+b), reflections f(-x) and -f(x), vertical/horizontal stretches af(x) and f(bx), composing transformations.

knowledge_components.name: Inverse functions
knowledge_components.description: Finding f⁻¹(x) algebraically, verifying f(f⁻¹(x)) = x, graphical relationship (reflection in y = x), domain restriction for invertibility.

knowledge_components.name: Composite functions
knowledge_components.description: Computing (f∘g)(x) = f(g(x)), domain of composite functions, decomposing a function into components.

knowledge_components.name: Exponential functions and graphs
knowledge_components.description: Shape of y = a^x and y = e^x, horizontal asymptote, growth and decay models, solving exponential equations graphically and algebraically.

knowledge_components.name: Logarithmic functions and graphs
knowledge_components.description: Shape of y = log_a(x) and y = ln(x), vertical asymptote, inverse relationship with exponential, solving logarithmic equations.

knowledge_components.name: Rational functions
knowledge_components.description: y = 1/x and y = (ax+b)/(cx+d), vertical and horizontal asymptotes, sketching rational functions, finding intercepts.

knowledge_components.name: Interpreting and sketching graphs
knowledge_components.description: Identifying key features: intercepts, turning points, asymptotes, intervals of increase/decrease, using GDC to graph and find features.

knowledge_components.name: Radian measure and arc length
knowledge_components.description: Converting between degrees and radians, arc length s = rθ, area of sector A = ½r²θ, area of segment.

knowledge_components.name: Unit circle and exact trig values
knowledge_components.description: sin, cos, tan defined on unit circle, exact values at 0, π/6, π/4, π/3, π/2 and their multiples, signs in each quadrant (CAST).

knowledge_components.name: Graphs of trigonometric functions
knowledge_components.description: Amplitude, period, phase shift of y = a sin(b(x+c)) + d, sketching transformed trig graphs, identifying parameters from a graph.

knowledge_components.name: Trigonometric identities
knowledge_components.description: Pythagorean identity sin²θ + cos²θ = 1, double angle formulas sin2θ = 2sinθcosθ and cos2θ = cos²θ - sin²θ, proving and applying identities.

knowledge_components.name: Solving trigonometric equations
knowledge_components.description: Solving sin x = k, cos x = k, tan x = k over given intervals, using identities to simplify before solving, general solution form.

knowledge_components.name: Sine rule and cosine rule
knowledge_components.description: a/sin A = b/sin B = c/sin C, a² = b² + c² - 2bc cos A, area = ½ab sin C, choosing which rule applies, ambiguous case.

knowledge_components.name: Descriptive statistics
knowledge_components.description: Mean, median, mode, range, IQR, standard deviation, variance; interpreting box plots, histograms, cumulative frequency graphs.

knowledge_components.name: Basic probability
knowledge_components.description: Sample space, events, P(A), complementary events, combined events P(A∪B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A∩B), mutually exclusive events.

knowledge_components.name: Conditional probability and independence
knowledge_components.description: P(A|B) = P(A∩B)/P(B), testing independence P(A∩B) = P(A)P(B), tree diagrams, Venn diagrams for combined events.

knowledge_components.name: Discrete random variables
knowledge_components.description: Probability distribution tables, E(X) = Σx·P(X=x), Var(X) = E(X²) - [E(X)]², interpreting expected value in context.

knowledge_components.name: Binomial distribution
knowledge_components.description: Conditions for binomial model (fixed n, independent trials, constant p), X ~ B(n,p), P(X=r) = nCr p^r (1-p)^(n-r), E(X) = np, Var(X) = np(1-p), GDC use.

knowledge_components.name: Normal distribution
knowledge_components.description: Properties of normal curve (symmetric, mean=median=mode), standardising Z = (X-μ)/σ, using GDC to find probabilities and inverse normal, interpreting in context.

knowledge_components.name: Correlation and linear regression
knowledge_components.description: Pearson's r, interpreting strength and direction, least-squares regression line y = mx + b, using line for prediction, limitations of extrapolation.

knowledge_components.name: Limits and continuity
knowledge_components.description: Intuitive concept of a limit, lim as x→a, limits from a graph and table, continuity at a point, informal understanding (not epsilon-delta proofs).

knowledge_components.name: Derivative as rate of change
knowledge_components.description: Gradient of tangent as limit of gradient of secant, derivative as instantaneous rate of change, notation f'(x) and dy/dx, differentiating from first principles for simple polynomials.

knowledge_components.name: Power rule and polynomial differentiation
knowledge_components.description: d/dx[x^n] = nx^(n-1), differentiating sums and differences, differentiating constants and negative/fractional powers.

knowledge_components.name: Chain rule
knowledge_components.description: dy/dx = dy/du · du/dx, differentiating composite functions, recognising inner and outer functions, applying to trig, exponential, and log composites.

knowledge_components.name: Product and quotient rules
knowledge_components.description: (uv)' = u'v + uv', (u/v)' = (u'v - uv')/v², choosing the correct rule, combining with chain rule for complex expressions.

knowledge_components.name: Derivatives of trig, exponential, and log functions
knowledge_components.description: d/dx[sin x] = cos x, d/dx[cos x] = -sin x, d/dx[e^x] = e^x, d/dx[ln x] = 1/x, applying these with chain/product/quotient rules.

knowledge_components.name: Tangent and normal lines
knowledge_components.description: Finding equation of tangent at a point using y - y1 = f'(x1)(x - x1), normal line has gradient -1/f'(x1), interpreting geometrically.

knowledge_components.name: Stationary points and curve sketching
knowledge_components.description: Setting f'(x) = 0 to find stationary points, first and second derivative tests for local max/min, identifying inflection points, sketching curves using calculus features.

knowledge_components.name: Optimisation
knowledge_components.description: Setting up objective functions from word problems, finding global max/min on closed intervals, verifying nature of stationary points, interpreting answers in context.

knowledge_components.name: Antiderivatives and indefinite integration
knowledge_components.description: Integration as reverse differentiation, ∫x^n dx = x^(n+1)/(n+1) + C, integrating e^x, 1/x, sin x, cos x; finding particular antiderivatives given initial conditions.

knowledge_components.name: Definite integrals and the fundamental theorem
knowledge_components.description: ∫[a to b] f(x) dx = F(b) - F(a), evaluating definite integrals, understanding signed area, properties of definite integrals.

knowledge_components.name: Area under and between curves
knowledge_components.description: Area between curve and x-axis, dealing with negative areas using |∫f dx|, area between two curves ∫[a to b](f(x) - g(x)) dx, setting up limits of integration from intersection points.

knowledge_components.name: Kinematics with calculus
knowledge_components.description: Displacement s(t), velocity v(t) = s'(t), acceleration a(t) = v'(t), integrating to find displacement from velocity, total distance vs displacement.
